title: bidens forbesii
intro: Bidens forbesii, also known as Forbes' beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens forbesii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments.
